The Collection

The Collection

The Story

Biography

"Be the one to decide."

AURACIN was born from two Latin words, Aurum, gold, and Cinis, ash. Two forces in tension: the permanent and the fleeting, luxury and decay, what endures and what burns away.

We make garments for people who understand that quality isn't loud. It doesn't need to announce itself. It's in the weight of the fabric, the precision of the print, the silence of a piece that simply fits, physically and spiritually.

Every piece is made to order. Nothing sits in a warehouse. Nothing is wasted. Your garment doesn't exist until you choose it, then it's made once, for you, and sent directly to your door.

AURACIN is not a brand. It's a standard. Golden Ash.

100%

EST. MMXXIV

Aurum, from the permanence of gold. Cinis, from the necessity of ash. Between them: everything worth wearing.
